title: NURSE FAMILY PARTNERSHIP - 211info
text: LINCOLN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH NURSE FAMILY PARTNERSHIP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Program that supports pregnant people from early pregnancy through their child’s second birthday, pairing new parents with a specially trained nurse for support, advice and resource connection. Nurses provide health and developmental screenings to identify potential problems with growth, hearing, social-emotional development, oral health, and other issues. Offers breastfeeding support, parenting support, and general parenting education. 255 SW Coast Highway Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: First-time birthing parent with a household income below 185% Federal Poverty Level, must enroll prior to the 29th week of pregnancy Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 265-4112 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 265-4112 Main phone Main phone (541) 265-4112 Intake (541) 265-0457 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Lincoln County Services: General Expectant/New Parent Assistance Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs Teen Expectant/New Parent Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - HIV/HEPATITIS C TESTING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY CONNECTS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINCOLN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
